name: BigCommerce
shortDescription: Connect FlowRunner to [BigCommerce](https://www.bigcommerce.com/) to manage your store catalog, customers, orders, carts, and pricing. The extension authenticates with OAuth2 (single-click app flow) and covers the catalog (products, variants, images, custom fields, modifiers, categories, brands), inventory adjustments, customers and addresses, customer groups, orders and shipments, refunds, carts, and price lists — plus real-time webhook triggers on orders, products, inventory, and customers.

actions.name: Create Product
actions.description: Creates a new product in the store catalog. Use this to add an item shoppers can buy; assign it to categories and a brand, and decide how its stock is tracked.

actions.name: Get Product
actions.description: Retrieves a single product by its ID, including price, type and current inventory. Use after picking a product to inspect its full detail.

actions.name: List Products
actions.description: Returns a page of products, optionally filtered by a search keyword. Use to browse the catalog or find a product before acting on it.

actions.name: Update Product
actions.description: Updates an existing product's fields such as name, price or visibility. Note: setting Inventory Level here only takes effect when the product's tracking is "Track by Product"; otherwise it is silently ignored — use Set Inventory Level for reliable stock changes.

actions.name: Delete Product
actions.description: Permanently deletes a product from the catalog. Use with care — this cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Product Variant
actions.description: Creates a single variant of a product (e.g. a specific size/color). Variants are created one at a time and are distinguished by their option values.

actions.name: Get Product Variant
actions.description: Retrieves a single variant of a product by its ID. Use to inspect a variant's SKU, price and inventory.

actions.name: List Product Variants
actions.description: Lists all variants of a product. Use to see the available sizes/colors before updating or pricing them.

actions.name: Update Product Variant
actions.description: Updates a variant's price override or inventory level. Use to adjust a specific size/color of a product.

actions.name: Delete Product Variant
actions.description: Deletes a single variant from a product. Use with care — this cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Product Image
actions.description: Adds an image to a product from a publicly accessible URL (GIF/JPEG/PNG, max 8MB). Use to set a product photo or its main thumbnail.

actions.name: List Product Images
actions.description: Lists all images attached to a product. Use to find an image's ID before deleting it.

actions.name: Delete Product Image
actions.description: Deletes an image from a product. Use List Product Images to find the image ID.

actions.name: Create Product Custom Field
actions.description: Adds a custom name/value field to a product (e.g. Material = Ceramic). Use for extra product attributes shown on the storefront.

actions.name: List Product Custom Fields
actions.description: Lists a product's custom fields. Use to find a custom field's ID before updating or deleting it.

actions.name: Update Product Custom Field
actions.description: Updates a product's custom field name or value. Use List Product Custom Fields to find the field ID.

actions.name: Delete Product Custom Field
actions.description: Deletes a custom field from a product. Use List Product Custom Fields to find the field ID.

actions.name: Create Product Modifier
actions.description: Adds a modifier (an extra purchase option such as engraving or gift wrap) to a product. Choose the input type shoppers use and whether it is required.

actions.name: List Product Modifiers
actions.description: Lists a product's modifiers. Use to find a modifier's ID before updating or deleting it.

actions.name: Update Product Modifier
actions.description: Updates a product modifier's display name or required flag. Use List Product Modifiers to find the modifier ID.

actions.name: Delete Product Modifier
actions.description: Deletes a modifier from a product. Use List Product Modifiers to find the modifier ID.

actions.name: Create Category
actions.description: Creates a storefront category. Use parent 0 for a top-level category or pick a parent to nest it. Categories organize products in navigation.

actions.name: Get Category
actions.description: Retrieves a single category by its ID. Use to inspect a category's details.

actions.name: List Categories
actions.description: Returns a page of categories. Use to browse the category tree or find a category before acting on it.

actions.name: Update Category
actions.description: Updates a category's name or visibility. Use Get Categories to pick the category.

actions.name: Delete Category
actions.description: Deletes a category from the catalog. Use with care — products in it lose this category assignment.

actions.name: Create Brand
actions.description: Creates a brand that products can be associated with. Brand names must be unique.

actions.name: Get Brand
actions.description: Retrieves a single brand by its ID. Use to inspect a brand's details.

actions.name: List Brands
actions.description: Returns a page of brands. Use to browse brands or find one before acting on it.

actions.name: Update Brand
actions.description: Updates a brand's name or logo. Use Get Brands to pick the brand.

actions.name: Delete Brand
actions.description: Deletes a brand. Use with care — products lose this brand association.

actions.name: Set Inventory Level
actions.description: Set a variant's stock count to an exact number at a location. This is the RELIABLE way to set stock — it avoids the product-level inventory_tracking pitfall.

actions.name: Adjust Inventory Level
actions.description: Add to or subtract from a variant's current stock count at a location (use a negative quantity to subtract). Use when you want a delta rather than an exact value.

actions.name: Create Customer
actions.description: Creates a customer account in the store. Email must be unique. Optionally assign the customer to a customer group.

actions.name: Get Customer
actions.description: Retrieves a single customer by ID. Use to inspect a customer's profile.

actions.name: List Customers
actions.description: Returns a page of customers, optionally filtered by email. Use to browse or find a customer before acting on them.

actions.name: Update Customer
actions.description: Updates a customer's name, email or group. Use Get Customers to pick the customer.

actions.name: Delete Customer
actions.description: Deletes a customer account. Use with care — this cannot be undone.

actions.name: Create Customer Address
actions.description: Adds an address to a customer. Use Get Customers to pick the customer; provide the full postal address.

actions.name: List Customer Addresses
actions.description: Lists a customer's saved addresses. Use to find an address ID before updating or deleting it.

actions.name: Update Customer Address
actions.description: Updates a customer address. Use List Customer Addresses to find the address ID; the customer ID is also required.

actions.name: Delete Customer Address
actions.description: Deletes a customer address. Use List Customer Addresses to find the address ID.

actions.name: Create Customer Group
actions.description: Creates a customer group (e.g. Wholesale) used for pricing and access rules. Customer groups live on the V2 API.

actions.name: Get Customer Group
actions.description: Retrieves a single customer group by ID. Use to inspect a group's details.

actions.name: List Customer Groups
actions.description: Returns a page of customer groups. Use to browse groups or find one before acting on it.

actions.name: Update Customer Group
actions.description: Updates a customer group's name or default flag. Use Get Customer Groups to pick the group.

actions.name: Delete Customer Group
actions.description: Deletes a customer group. Use with care — members revert to no group.

actions.name: Create Order
actions.description: Create an order directly (e.g. phone/manual orders). Provide a billing address and at least one product line — either a catalog product (product_id) or a custom line (name + prices).

actions.name: Get Order
actions.description: Retrieves a single order by ID, including status and totals. Use to inspect an order.

actions.name: List Orders
actions.description: Returns a page of orders, optionally filtered by status or customer. Use to find orders to fulfill or refund.

actions.name: Update Order
actions.description: Update an existing order's fields (e.g. customer message, staff notes). To change only the order's status, use Update Order Status.

actions.name: Update Order Status
actions.description: Transition an order to a different status (e.g. Awaiting Fulfillment, Shipped, Completed). Use Get Order Statuses to pick the new status.

actions.name: List Order Products
actions.description: Lists the line items (products) of an order. Use to find order_product_id values for creating shipments or refunds.

actions.name: List Order Coupons
actions.description: Lists the coupons applied to an order. Use to see discounts on an order.

actions.name: List Order Statuses
actions.description: List all order statuses configured for the store (id + name). Use this to find the status_id for Update Order Status.

actions.name: Create Order Shipment
actions.description: Creates a shipment for an order, marking items as shipped with optional tracking. The order must already have products and a shipping address.

actions.name: Get Order Shipment
actions.description: Retrieves a single shipment of an order by ID. Use to inspect tracking and shipped items.

actions.name: List Order Shipments
actions.description: Lists all shipments of an order. Use to find a shipment ID before updating or deleting it.

actions.name: Update Order Shipment
actions.description: Updates a shipment's tracking number or carrier. Use List Order Shipments to find the shipment ID.

actions.name: Delete Order Shipment
actions.description: Deletes a shipment from an order. Use List Order Shipments to find the shipment ID.

actions.name: Create Refund Quote
actions.description: Calculate a refund quote for an order before issuing it — returns the refundable items and the payment providers that can be refunded. Run this first, then Create Refund.

actions.name: Create Refund
actions.description: Issue a refund against an order with a settled payment. Use Create Refund Quote first to get valid payment providers and amounts.

actions.name: List Refunds
actions.description: Lists the refunds issued against an order. Use to audit an order's refund history.

actions.name: Create Cart
actions.description: Creates a new cart with one or more line items. Use to start an order programmatically (e.g. a saved cart for a customer). Carts have no list endpoint — keep the returned cart ID.

actions.name: Get Cart
actions.description: Retrieves a cart by its ID (returned by Create Cart). Use to inspect a cart's line items and totals.

actions.name: Add Cart Line Items
actions.description: Adds one or more products to an existing cart. Use Create Cart first to get the cart ID.

actions.name: Delete Cart
actions.description: Deletes a cart by its ID. Use to discard an abandoned or completed cart.

actions.name: Create Price List
actions.description: Creates a price list — a named set of per-variant price overrides (e.g. wholesale pricing). Note: price lists are a Pro/Enterprise-plan feature on some BigCommerce plans.

actions.name: Get Price List
actions.description: Retrieves a single price list by ID. Use to inspect a price list's details.

actions.name: List Price Lists
actions.description: Returns a page of price lists. Use to browse price lists or find one before acting on it.

actions.name: Update Price List
actions.description: Updates a price list's name or active status. Use Get Price Lists to pick the list.

actions.name: Delete Price List
actions.description: Deletes a price list and all its price records. Use with care.

actions.name: Set Price Record
actions.description: Set the price override for a variant in a price list and currency (creates or updates). Use to apply wholesale or regional pricing to a specific variant.

actions.name: List Price Records
actions.description: Lists the price records (variant price overrides) in a price list. Use to audit a price list's overrides.

actions.name: Delete Price Record
actions.description: Removes a variant's price override in a given currency from a price list. Use to revert a variant to its default price.

idealUseCases: Add and maintain products, variants, images, categories, and brands programmatically.
Reliably set or adjust stock levels per variant and location.
Create and manage customers, addresses, and customer groups.
Create orders, transition order statuses, and create shipments with tracking.
Quote and issue order refunds against settled payments.
Build carts and add line items for headless or assisted-selling flows.
Apply wholesale or regional pricing with price lists and per-variant price records.
React in real time to new orders, status changes, product/inventory updates, and new customers.
agentIdeas: When a **BigCommerce** "On Order Created" trigger fires, use **Gmail** "Send Message" to email the customer an order confirmation and **Google Sheets** "Add Row" to log the order into a sales tracking spreadsheet.
When a **BigCommerce** "On Inventory Updated" trigger fires for a low-stock variant, use **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to alert the operations channel so the team can reorder.
Use **Google Sheets** "Get Rows" to read a supplier price feed, then call **BigCommerce** "Set Price Record" for each variant to sync wholesale pricing into a price list.
